atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports establishing care.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of DCIS.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a right breast lumpectomy in January 2020.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling good since January 2020.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports regularly performing self-breast exams.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports detecting no abnormalities during self-breast exams.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a calcification found in her right breast in October 2019.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an ultrasound-guided core needle biopsy in December 2019.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pathology revealing grade two, ER positive, PR positive DCIS.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the lumpectomy in January 2020.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports negative margins in the lumpectomy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports five lymph nodes removed, all negative for malignancy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports her last mammogram was in January 2021.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports her last mammogram was normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports skin thickening at the medial inferior aspect of the right breast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals skin thickening at the medial inferior aspect of the right breast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of stage zero, ER positive, PR positive DCIS.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any evidence of tumor progression.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is post-lumpectomy with negative margins and lymph nodes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's ECOG performance status is zero.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination of the left shoulder reveals reduced active abduction and pain with impingement testing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's vital signs are within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should continue to be observed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician orders shoulder radiographs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician initiates physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician continues acetaminophen as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in one year.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician schedules a mammogram in April 2022.
